cause_analysis.narrative: Glow Aesthetics & Med Spa NYC churned on 2026-02-05 after 356 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 25-day silence starting 2026-02-02. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-28 via sms, client wrote: "Thank you dear I want to stay loyal and come back with your company when I am all set but if you are treating me this wa…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-03 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Stopping google ads\n\nBody: Hello Asmita Please respond with confirmation that we stopped google advertisement…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

messages.body: Subject: Stopping google ads\n\nBody: Hello Asmita Please respond with confirmation that we stopped google advertisements starting January 01, 2026. Regards, Irene Igitian
Let me check with my ads team

Thank you dear I want to stay loyal and come back with your company when I am all set but if you are treating me this way I may reconsider . They keep charging me since January like you never informed them that I am not using ads anymore.

Hi Irene, Yes, there’s some discrepancies in the total number of reviews between Google and the app. We're currently addressing some internal updates with Google, and I'll ensure our team looks into this promptly. Thank you for your patience, and I'm here to support you!

Alternatively, please feel free to use my Calendly link to block a time on my calendar at your convenience: (https://calendly.com/shikha-s-zoca/zoca-call?utm_content=8201&utm_term=71043&month=2025-12)  I look forward to connecting with you soon!

I'm at the appointment. All right. Just call me back wheneve…

Hi Irene,  Please don’t worry at all. You may continue to receive automated system emails; however, as promised, you will not be charged.  If you have any questions or need clarity on anything, feel free to reach out—I’m happy to help.
